Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Emperor's crown]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor's crown contains bound Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The crown is an invested object more powerful than normal ones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The crown requires being Awakened to control people against their will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The crown can be used to persuade the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Emperor's crown is an artifact used by Calder Marten.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Calder wears the Emperor's crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — The Emperor's crown is a golden crown.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Calder Marten was wearing the Emperor's crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — The Emperor's crown is being used to force Consultants to betray their cause.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — The Navigator wears the Emperor's crown.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — The Emperor’s crown can infuse words with Intent.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — The Emperor's crown can control any loyal citizens of the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — The Consultants have no defense against the Emperor's crown without Bastion's Veil.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — The Emperor's crown is an Imperial relic that has been lost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — The Emperor's crown is the object to be retrieved.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The Emperor’s crown contains the Emperor's memories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — The Emperor’s crown is an item that the Collector of Souls might seek.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — The Emperor's crown has power to defend Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — The Emperor's crown is a prize that Great Elders might seek.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 12''' — A crown is kept in a heavy safe carried by the cook.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 12''' — The return of the crown would benefit the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — The Emperor’s crown was in a safe held by a toad creature.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — The Emperor's crown is a gold circlet resting on a velvet lining.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — The Emperor's crown was made by the Magister’s Guild with assistance from Regent Loreli.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Touching the Emperor's crown overwhelms the user with the force of the Emperor's will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — The Emperor’s crown can be used to soothe allies.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — The Champions stripped Calder's body of the Emperor's crown.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — A crown is only removed if the wearer is killed while wearing it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — There are supposed to be twenty-eight more crowns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Crowns appear at a rate of ten per hour.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Crowns appear during the tournament rounds.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Kerani saw a glimmer of white light resembling a crown behind Terkell's head.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
